subject: [RFC PATCH 41/45] btrfs: allocate eb-attached btree pages as movable

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch allows extent buffer pages allocated by the btrfs file system to be marked as movable, which enables them to be migrated and freed up memory. The change targets a common fragmentation issue where these pages are pinned in place, preventing large allocations from occurring. By adding the __GFP_MOVABLE flag to the allocation of these pages, they can now be moved out of the way, reducing memory pressure and allowing for more efficient use of system resources.
